home.title: Jakub Dolének | Full-stack Developer
home.description: Portfolio of Jakub Dolének featuring full-stack projects, automation systems, and collaboration contact.

about.title: About | Jakub Dolének
about.description: Experience, education, and engineering focus of Jakub Dolének as a full-stack developer.

person.description: Full-stack developer focused on process automation, backend services, and self-hosting in a personal homelab.

hero.intro: Hi, I'm Jakub Dolének, and I enjoy
hero.description: I build software with modern technologies that solves real-world problems and saves time.

projects.heading: Projects
projects.subheading: Selected work with measurable engineering impact.

levne-deskovky.title: Levné Deskovky
levne-deskovky.summary: Czech board-game price tracker that unifies seller data under canonical slugs with bilingual search, filtering, and seller price history.
levne-deskovky.impact: Improves price transparency through merged offers, availability states, and automated Supabase catalog updates.

discord-automation.title: Discord Automation
discord-automation.summary: Desktop WPF app that embeds Discord via WebView2 and automates command dispatch through DevTools with DOM polling.
discord-automation.impact: Improved reliability with deterministic deduplication logic, structured logs, and stable long-running operation.

kuchar-v-akci.title: Recepty v Akci
kuchar-v-akci.summary: Self-hosted recipe platform inspired by supermarket flyers with structured ingredients and preparation steps.
kuchar-v-akci.impact: n8n workflows convert daily flyer PDFs into Supabase recipes, enabling end-to-end automated publishing.

smithing-master-bot.title: Bot using PyAutoGUI
smithing-master-bot.summary: Desktop automation bot using PyAutoGUI and OpenCV template matching to control an Android emulator.
smithing-master-bot.impact: Fully automates time-intensive repetitive tasks in a mobile game using screen-based computer vision.

portfolio.title: Personal Portfolio
portfolio.summary: This site, built with React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion to present work with a strong engineering-first narrative.
portfolio.impact: Provides bilingual content, SEO metadata, and polished project presentation while keeping performance and accessibility in focus.

mobile-game-unity.title: Mobile Game in Unity
mobile-game-unity.summary: Casual RPG prototype with clicker and crafting mechanics built with C# in Unity.
mobile-game-unity.impact: Delivered a functional progression system and playable Android prototype.

contact.description: If you are hiring or building, feel free to reach out.

about.title: About me
about.intro:
I'm <highlight>Jakub Dolének</highlight>, a full-stack developer.
At work, I currently focus mainly on backend systems, while in my free time I build <highlight>full-stack</highlight> applications.
Recently, I have been deep into <highlight>self-hosting</highlight>. I run a lab on Linux servers with Proxmox and Docker.
Programming has been my hobby for many years, so I am always looking for new challenges and opportunities to learn.

timeline.title: Programmer
timeline.description: I develop automation software and scripts tailored to each customer and their ERP processes. I also create educational and promotional content for social media.

timeline.title: University of Hradec Králové
timeline.description: I study software engineering with focus on architecture, algorithms, and databases. I work on full-stack team projects and apply best practices in testing, design, and deployment.

timeline.title: Secondary Technical School Hradec Králové
timeline.description: I gained a strong foundation in computer hardware, networking, and programming. During this period I also started building my first production-like software in C#.

footer.note: © {{year}} Jakub Dolének. Built with focus on practical engineering.
